full_description: Find the red block; if it is hidden in {B}, open {B}, then place the block on {C}.
schema: {A} denotes the red block, {B} denotes the cabinet, {C} denotes the blue pad, {a} denotes the arm moving the block, {b} denotes the arm opening the cabinet, {s} denotes whether the block starts on the table or in the drawer
preference: num of words should not exceed 24. Mention searching, opening the cabinet only if needed, and placing the block on the pad.
seen: Find {A}; if it is in {B}, open it and place {A} on {C}.
Search for {A}, open {B} if needed, then put it on {C}.
Locate the red block and move it from {s} to {C}.
If {A} is hidden, open {B}; then place {A} on {C}.
Use {a} to move {A} onto {C} after searching the scene.
unseen: Find the red block and put it on the blue pad.
Search the table and cabinet, then move the block to the pad.
Open the cabinet only when needed and place the block on the pad.
put the block on the pad
